[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00010001 2
4 00001000 1
5 10100001 3
6 00011011 4
7 10101101 5

01 00010010 2
12 00000100 1
23 10101011 5
34 01010000 2
45 00101010 3
56 11000101 4
67 00011010 3
70 11100100 4

02 00010000 1
13 10101101 5 match 7
24 10000000 1
35 00000000 a match 0 1 2
46 00100001 2
57 00010000 1
60 00000000 a match 0 1 2
71 01000000 1

25 00101010 3
36 01000000 1
47 00001010 2

61 00010010 2
72 01000100 2

04 00010000 1

37 00010000 1

51 01010000 2
